name: Windborne Bouquet
description:
A special drink that exudes a quiet elegance with its exquisite aroma. This is a masterpiece that was crafted for Emilie with "Lumidouce Twilight" serving as the creative inspiration when The Honorary Knight's Cocktail Shack was in operation.
The perfumer from Fontaine told you that excessive sweetness makes people drowsy, and she prefers to enjoy just a light touch of tipsiness. Clearly, knocking a guest out at the bar isn't a bartender's main goal...
On days of gentle wind and clear skies, heightened senses can amplify the flavor of a perfectly harmonious drink.
Inspired by the art of fragrance, you developed this subtle, elegant masterpiece, and Emilie decided to name it "Windborne Bouquet" like the perfumer she is...
